mapper.sql:
rr.is_deleted = 0
and rr.doctor_id = #{doctorId}
and rr.status =
0 1 2 3 -1
and ( rr.register_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or dp.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
mapper.select: select rr.id as id, rr.register_no as registerNo, su.real_name as customerName, su.phone as phone, p.name as petName, p.species as petSpecies, dp.name as doctorName, rr.register_time as visitTime, case rr.status when 0 then 'WAITING' when 1 then 'IN_PROGRESS' when 2 then 'DONE' when 3 then 'CANCELED' else 'WAITING' end as status from register_record rr left join sys_user su on su.id = rr.owner_user_id left join pet p on p.id = rr.pet_id left join doctor_profile dp on dp.id = rr.doctor_id where order by rr.id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(1) from register_record rr left join sys_user su on su.id = rr.owner_user_id left join pet p on p.id = rr.pet_id left join doctor_profile dp on dp.id = rr.doctor_id where
mapper.update: update register_record set status = #{status}, update_time = now(), updated_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
